description: kp-natal baseline — KP-New/Placidus natal chart. --rp-datetime pins the Ruling Planets moment (this script calls datetime.now() when that flag is omitted, so it MUST be pinned for byte-stable output).

chart_path.description: Same pinned birth chart (KP/Placidus cusps, KP ayanamsa), entered as a hand-authored pasted chart instead of ephemeris inputs, expanded via lib/chart_io.py --mode kp and fed to the baseline via --chart. The positions fixture carries a 'birth' block so meta.location is populated and Ruling Planets still resolves from --rp-datetime alone (no --lat/--lon/--tz needed on the CLI). Only ayanamsa.mode/value_dms differ from the ephemeris-path snapshot.
